name: Terra Kulture
description: Pan-African cultural restaurant on Victoria Island known for authentic Nigerian dishes, art exhibitions and live cultural events. A landmark for both locals and visitors.

name: Nkoyo Restaurant
description: Upscale Nigerian restaurant at the Marriott Hotel, Lagos. Serves elevated takes on traditional dishes like ofe onugbu, banga soup and peppered snails in a refined hotel setting.

name: Yellow Chilli
description: Popular Nigerian restaurant chain with several Lagos outlets. Known for excellent buka-style cooking in a comfortable, slightly upscale setting. Consistent quality across the menu.

name: Mama Cass Restaurant
description: Beloved Lagos chain famous for generous portions of traditional Nigerian food at honest prices. Jollof rice, egusi, banga soup and local proteins. A Lagos institution since the 1990s.

name: Shiro Restaurant and Lounge
description: Sleek Pan-Asian restaurant and lounge on Victoria Island serving sushi, dim sum, and Asian fusion dishes. Popular for upscale date nights and corporate dinners.

name: Craft Grill
description: Modern grill restaurant specialising in premium steaks, grilled seafood and craft cocktails. Popular for business lunches and weekend celebrations.

name: Ikokore Place
description: Small, no-frills restaurant in Ikorodu-Aguda area specialising in the Ijebu-Yoruba water yam porridge (ikokore). Authentic and local. Long queues at lunch.

name: Onyeka's Kitchen
description: Home-style Igbo restaurant in Wuse 2, Abuja. Known for authentic ofe onugbu, oha soup and nkwobi. Feels like eating at a relative's house — warm, generous and honest.

name: Kilimanjaro Restaurant
description: One of Abuja's oldest and most beloved Nigerian restaurants. A chain with multiple locations, serving reliable Nigerian classics. Popular with civil servants, families and tourists.

name: Ceddi Plaza Food Court
description: Diverse food court inside Ceddi Plaza mall with options ranging from Nigerian street food to fast food, pizza, Chinese and continental. Good for groups with varied tastes.

name: Pelican Seafood Restaurant
description: Port Harcourt's best-known seafood restaurant, serving fresh Niger Delta catch — catfish, tilapia, crayfish and king prawns. Riverside setting with open-air dining.

name: Chicken Republic
description: Nigeria's most popular home-grown fast food chain. Fried chicken, burgers, jollof rice and sides. Ubiquitous, reliable, and fast. The go-to for a quick Nigerian fast food fix.

name: KFC Nigeria
description: International fried chicken chain with Nigerian-adapted menu items. Consistent quality in the Nigerian fast food segment. Popular for family outings and post-cinema meals.

name: Bungalow Restaurant
description: Trendy Nigerian restaurant known for its grilled proteins — fish, chicken, goat — and signature house stew. Rooftop seating with views. Popular with young professionals.

name: Spice Route India
description: Authentic North and South Indian cuisine in Lagos. Known among the expat community but increasingly popular with locals who enjoy spicy food. Excellent biryani and masala dishes.

name: The Wheatbaker
description: Boutique hotel restaurant in Ikoyi known for exceptional continental and Nigerian cuisine. Elegant atmosphere, impeccable service, and a wine list that rivals any in West Africa.

name: Jazzhole Bookshop and Cafe
description: Lagos's most celebrated independent bookshop on Awolowo Road, Ikoyi. Curates African literature, art books, music and gifts. The go-to for serious readers and creatives.

name: Glendora Books
description: Long-established Lagos bookshop with broad selection of academic, fiction and non-fiction titles. Multiple locations. Good for university texts, Nigerian authors and international bestsellers.

name: Things Fall Apart by Chinua Achebe
description: The foundational novel of modern African literature. A vivid portrait of Igbo life before and during colonial disruption. Essential reading for anyone interested in Nigerian culture and history.

name: Purple Hibiscus by Chimamanda Ngozi Adichie
description: Adichie's debut novel about a family in post-colonial Nigeria, navigating faith, oppression and coming-of-age. Beautiful prose with deep Nigerian cultural roots.

name: Half of a Yellow Sun by Chimamanda Ngozi Adichie
description: Powerful novel set during the Nigerian Civil War (Biafra). Told through three perspectives. One of the most important works of contemporary African fiction.

name: Stay With Me by Ayobami Adebayo
description: Gripping debut novel about a marriage tested by infertility and family secrets in 1980s Nigeria. Emotionally resonant with beautiful Yoruba cultural detail.

name: An Orchestra of Minorities by Chigozie Obioma
description: Booker Prize-shortlisted novel narrated by a chi (personal spirit) observing its human host. Rich Igbo cosmology, mythic scope and modern tragedy.

name: Americanah by Chimamanda Ngozi Adichie
description: A sharp, funny and deeply perceptive novel about race, identity and return. Follows a Nigerian woman navigating America and the UK before coming home to Lagos.

name: The Secret Lives of Baba Segi's Wives by Lola Shoneyin
description: Bold, witty novel about polygamy and female power in contemporary Nigeria. Dark comedy with sharp social commentary. A landmark in Nigerian women's writing.

name: Filmhouse Cinemas
description: Nigeria's leading cinema chain with premium screens across Lagos, Abuja and other cities. Shows Nollywood, Hollywood, and international films. Offers 4DX and IMAX experiences.

name: Genesis Cinema
description: Nigeria's second-largest cinema chain. Multiple locations including Port Harcourt and Enugu. Good screen quality and Dolby audio. Strong Nollywood programming.

name: A Tribe Called Judah (2023)
description: Record-breaking Nollywood heist film directed by Jade Osiberu. Starring Funke Akindele. A fast-paced, Lagos-set thriller that became the highest-grossing Nollywood film at release.

name: Gangs of Lagos (2023)
description: Gritty Lagos crime drama following childhood friends who grow up in the Isale Eko area. Visually striking, raw and emotionally heavy. A major moment for Nigerian cinema.

name: The Black Book (2023)
description: High-octane action thriller on Netflix starring Richard Mofe-Damijo (RMD) as a deacon seeking justice for his son. Production quality at par with international action films.

name: Anikulapo (2022)
description: Award-winning Kunle Afolayan film drawing on Yoruba mythology. Epic storytelling across ancient and spiritual worlds. One of the most ambitious Nigerian films ever made.

name: Citation (2020)
description: Kunle Afolayan drama about a female student fighting sexual harassment by a professor. Filmed across Nigeria and Senegal. Important, well-acted and timely.

name: King of Boys (2018)
description: Crime political thriller starring Sola Sobowale as a Lagos businesswoman with underworld connections pursuing political power. Landmark Nigerian film that changed Nollywood.

name: Living in Bondage: Breaking Free (2019)
description: Sequel to the classic 1992 Nollywood film. Modern, high-quality continuation of the original story with new generation cast. Bridges classic and contemporary Nollywood.

name: Inkblot Productions Catalogue
description: Nigeria's most consistent film production company behind Wedding Party, Merry Men, and more. Quality Nigerian comedy and drama films. Reliable picks for family entertainment.

name: Slot Systems Nigeria
description: Nigeria's largest electronics retail chain. Smartphones, laptops, accessories and gadgets. Multiple locations nationwide. Good for genuine products with warranty.

name: Fouani Nigeria
description: Official Samsung distributor and broader electronics retailer in Nigeria. Large showroom in Ikeja with competitive pricing on Samsung devices, LG and other brands.

name: Computer Village, Ikeja
description: Lagos's famous electronics market in Ikeja. The largest electronics market in West Africa. Everything from new to refurbished gadgets, repairs, and accessories. Negotiation required.

name: 3CHub Technology Store
description: Premium electronics and Apple products retail store in Abuja. Known for knowledgeable staff and genuine products. Official service centre for several brands.

name: Yudala Electronics
description: Nigerian online electronics retailer offering smartphones, home appliances and gadgets with delivery nationwide. Competitive pricing and pay-on-delivery option.

name: Transcorp Hilton Abuja
description: Nigeria's most iconic five-star hotel in the heart of Abuja. World-class facilities, multiple restaurants, a spa, and a pool. The preferred choice for dignitaries and business travellers.

name: Eko Hotel and Suites
description: Lagos's premier hotel on Victoria Island with multiple towers, restaurants, a beach club, convention centre and casino. A city within a city. Hosts major events and concerts.

name: Radisson Blu Anchorage Hotel
description: Waterfront five-star hotel in Victoria Island with stunning lagoon views. Excellent service, multiple dining options and rooftop pool. Popular for business stays.

name: Bogobiri House Hotel
description: Lagos's most beloved boutique hotel in Ikoyi. Art-filled, intimate and culturally rich. Known for live music nights, art exhibitions and a literary crowd.

name: Protea Hotel Ikeja
description: International hotel chain in Ikeja, Lagos. Good business facilities, reliable service and competitive pricing. Popular for airport proximity and business meetings.

name: Freedom Park Lagos
description: Historic entertainment park on Lagos Island, built on the site of a colonial prison. Outdoor concerts, food festivals, art installations and literary events. A cultural hub.

name: Nike Art Gallery
description: One of Africa's largest art galleries, owned by Nike Davies-Okundaye on Lagos Island. Four floors of Nigerian art, fabrics, sculpture and live demonstrations.

name: Lagos National Museum
description: Nigeria's main national museum in Onikan, Lagos. Houses Benin bronzes, archaeological finds and cultural artefacts. Essential for Nigerian history and culture enthusiasts.

name: Quilox Club
description: Lagos's most famous nightclub on Victoria Island. Multi-floor venue with Afrobeats, house and international DJs. Known for celebrity sightings and high-energy atmosphere.

name: Sky Bar by Radisson
description: Rooftop bar with panoramic Victoria Island views. Excellent cocktails, sunset sessions and a sophisticated crowd. One of Lagos's best spots for drinks with a view.

name: Sweet Sensation
description: Homegrown Nigerian fast food chain serving pastries, meat pies, egg rolls, sausage rolls and light meals. A Lagos breakfast and snack institution. Excellent coffee.

name: So Fresh Lagos
description: Nigerian healthy food chain offering fresh salads, smoothies, wraps and grilled proteins. Multiple Lagos locations. Popular with health-conscious young professionals.

name: The Clock Tower Restaurant
description: Iconic Abuja restaurant known for continental and Nigerian cuisine, live music and elegant atmosphere. One of Abuja's most enduring fine dining destinations.

name: Epicerie Lagos
description: French-influenced bistro in Ikoyi. Croissants, quiche, steak frites and exceptional coffee. The closest thing to a Parisian cafe experience in Lagos.

name: Lifestore Pharmacy
description: Premium pharmacy and wellness store in Lagos. Prescription and over-the-counter medicines, supplements, skincare and health equipment. Known for reliable stock and trained pharmacists.

name: Bluechip Fitness
description: Modern gym and fitness centre in Victoria Island with state-of-the-art equipment, group classes, swimming pool and personal training. Lagos's premium fitness destination.

name: Tara Spa
description: Luxury spa and wellness centre in Lagos. Massages, facials, body wraps and beauty treatments. Quiet, professional and consistently high standard. Great for unwinding.

name: Ozone Cinema (Leisure Mall)
description: Cinema complex inside Leisure Mall, Surulere. Affordable tickets, good screen quality and a more local Lagos experience. Well-attended for Nollywood releases.

name: Half Bread Cafe
description: Artisan Lagos cafe in Yaba known for specialty coffee, sourdough toasties and quiet work atmosphere. Beloved by the Lagos creative and tech community.

name: Oriire Spa and Wellness
description: Abuja's top-rated day spa offering traditional and modern wellness treatments. Nigerian herbal steam baths, deep tissue massage and skincare. Cultural wellness experience.
